title: Mass Email: Sending Without Using Personal Email Address

posts.author: TituszHegely (Titusz Hegely)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I use the mass email section in Monday Sales & CRM, emails are sent from the connected address (e.g., mine). However, I’d prefer not to have mass emails sent directly from my personal email to clients.

Typically, mass email platforms generate a system email, while client replies are directed to your personal email.

Is this something Monday can accommodate, or do you know of an alternative solution for this?

Thank you so much for your help!
